---
layout: cv
title: Melanie Anderson Resume
---
# Melanie Anderson
Business Analytics Major, Finance Minor, Data Science Certificate.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="mel.anderson4216@gmail.com">isaac@applesdofall.org</a>
| <a href="linkedin.com/in/melanie-danielle-anderson/?skipRedirect=true">My LinkedIn page</a>
<!-- | <a href="https://yourusername.github.io/datascience_portfolio/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a> -->
| <a href="C:\Users\Melanie Anderson\OneDrive - BYU-Idaho\Other\Anderson.Resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Attending BYU-Idaho, studying business analytics.

### Interests

Merchandising, Product Development, Storytelling with Data


## Education

`2022-2026`
__Brigham Young University-Idaho__

pdated: May 2013 -->
